Service.Name: OGC:WMS
Service.Title: EFFIS
Service.Abstract: The European Forest Fire Information System (EFFIS) supports the services in charge of the protection of forests against fires in the EU countries and provides the European Commission services and the European Parliament with updated and reliable information on wildland fires in Europe.

Layer.Name: EFFIS
Layer.Title: EFFIS
Layer.Abstract: The European Forest Fire Information System (EFFIS) supports the services in charge of the protection of forests against fires in the EU countries and provides the European Commission services and the European Parliament with updated and reliable information on wildland fires in Europe.

Attribution.Title: The geodata are released under the terms and conditions of the EU Data License, available at https://ec.europa.eu/geninfo/legal_notices_en.htm

Layer.Name: fwi_nuts5.fwi
Layer.Title: fwi_nuts5.fwi
Layer.Abstract: FWI model mapped on NUTS5 GISCO layer

Layer.Name: ercc.ba
Layer.Title: Current Season Burned Areas in last 30 days

Layer.Name: ercc.ba_24hrs_point
Layer.Title: Current Season Burned Areas in last 24 hrs
